arts.ttl: I respected decision to block Arsenal transfer - now I could join rivals Chelsea
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa star Douglas Luiz could be in line for a swift return to the Premier League, with Chelsea reportedly showing interest in snapping up the Juventus midfielder. With the January window wide open, rumours have continued to swirl that Luiz might depart Turin, and reports have been linking him with a loan move back to his old stomping ground at Aston Villa, where he was a fan favourite across five seasons.

arts.ttl: Five ways Arsenal can line up with Benjamin Sesko if Mikel Arteta completes £70m transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal are hoping to sign an attacker within the next two weeks as Mikel Arteta hopes to address issues in front of goal as the club continues to chase Liverpool in the Premier League. Saka has long been the Gunners' main attacking outlet in the last few seasons - providing five goals and 10 assists in his 16 appearances this league campaign.

arts.ttl: Arsenal sent Alexander Isak message as 'first move' made before stellar transfer audition
arts.sum: Newcastle may have indicated their willingness to part ways with Arsenal transfer target Alexander Isak by showing interest in a new striker, who enjoyed a stellar audition against Liverpool this week

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s Gabriel Jesus undergoes successful surgery on his ACL
arts.sum: The 27-year-old is set to miss the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal player wants €13m to leave Gunners – Arteta request could be key
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Brazilian media, Jorginho’s proposed transfer from Arsenal to Flamengo has stalled due to differences over the contract offered to the Italy international. In recent weeks the 33-year-old has been linked with a move to the Brazilian giants after reports his agent is working on a deal. 'Recent contact': Arsenal have begun talks to sign £55m striker who is keen to play for Arteta - journalist
arts.sum: Since Gabriel Jesus’ injury, Arsenal’s discourse on adding a new striker in January has seemingly changed quite dramatically. Now, Mikel Arteta is quite openly talking...

arts.sum: Heading into the final weeks of the January transfer window, Arsenal are seemingly no closer to adding firepower to Mikel Arteta’s squad, at least from...

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus breaks silence on Arsenal injury nightmare after Mikel Arteta blow
arts.sum: Just days later, Arsenal confirmed that Jesus, who had scored five goals in his last six appearances in all competitions, had sustained an anterior cruciate ligament injury to his left leg and would require surgery to correct the issue. After the severity of Jesus' injury was confirmed, Arteta revealed that Arsenal will explore the possibility of recruiting a striker this month.

arts.ttl: Gary Lineker and Alan Shearer agree on divisive rule with Arsenal and Liverpool affected
arts.sum: Fans of Premier League title contenders Arsenal and Liverpool won't be able to watch their respective teams play live on television in the UK this weekend due to the 3pm blackout
